svg.title: Synalux POS — receipts
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for receipts. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Header/Footer text -- Logo toggle -- Tip line -- Social links -- QR code
Thank you for dining with us!
Shows individual tax lines on receipt
Prints blank tip line for cash payments
Links to digital receipt / review page
Thank you for dining with us!
Only if customer email in pos_customers
All fields sourced from pos_config -- no hardcodes
